title: scale+pdc vs CPA/BioLord/State/GEARS/scLambda split-centered analysis v4

comparison_policy.summary: Primary baseline comparisons must use external non-scale models: CPA, BioLord, State, GEARS, and scLambda. Detailed baseline analysis should include available metric profiles, cellclass/per-perturbation breakdowns, and DE/logFC artifact availability. Prior LLM, train delta-memory, memory anchors, lambda0, raw weak baselines, and other scale-family ablations are diagnostic-only and must not be used as the main baseline evidence.
diagnostic_only: prior LLM and train delta-memory artifacts

manual_baseline_availability.note: No Replogle CPA artifact found in current VCBench summary tables or run directories; do not substitute prior LLM or delta-memory.
No Replogle BioLord artifact found in current VCBench summary tables or run directories; do not substitute prior LLM or delta-memory.
No Replogle State artifact found in current VCBench summary tables or run directories; do not substitute scale-family state-memory artifacts.
No Replogle GEARS artifact found in current VCBench summary tables or run directories.
No Replogle scLambda artifact found in current VCBench summary tables or run directories.

gene_level_de_availability.note: External Replogle baseline prediction artifacts are not present, so baseline de_top100_real_vs_pred_log2fc cannot be generated from current files.
VCBench baseline runs expose summary_avg.csv and summary_by_cellclass.csv metrics including cosine_logfc, spearman_logfc, deg_precision/recall/iou, but not paired DE CSVs.
VCBench baseline runs expose logFC/DE-overlap proxy metrics, not paired real_de/pred_de CSVs.
Matched artifacts contain pred/real h5ad paths and per-perturbation deltaPCC/RMSE summaries, but no precomputed real_de/pred_de CSVs.
Matched artifacts contain pred/real h5ad paths and per-perturbation deltaPCC/RMSE summaries, but no precomputed real_de/pred_de CSVs.
Matched artifacts contain pred/real h5ad paths and per-perturbation deltaPCC/RMSE summaries, but no precomputed real_de/pred_de CSVs.
Matched artifacts contain pred/real h5ad paths and per-combo deltaPCC/RMSE summaries, but no precomputed real_de/pred_de CSVs.

split_sections.title: Replogle full-cell held-out cell lines
split_sections.question: Does scale+pdc recover perturbation deltas and top-DE gene direction across Replogle cell-line contexts?
split_sections.object: delta expression and top100 real/pred log2FC from cell_eval real_de/pred_de files
split_sections.method: Use per-perturbation deltaPCC, DE precision@K, direction match, amplitude bias, and real_vs_pred log2FC scatter.

split_sections.title: Kang Task05 LOPO patient splits
split_sections.question: On held-out patients, does scale+pdc beat CPA/BioLord/State/GEARS/scLambda and which baseline is strongest?
split_sections.object: patient/cellclass perturbation delta metrics and VCBench logFC/DE proxy metrics
split_sections.method: Compare headline deltaPCC by patient; inspect baseline metric profile and cellclass heatmaps.

split_sections.title: Norman Task07 held-out combinatorial genes
split_sections.question: For unseen combinatorial gene perturbations, where does scale+pdc stand relative to non-scale baselines?
split_sections.object: held-out combo-gene deltaPCC plus VCBench logFC/DE proxy metrics
split_sections.method: Compare scale+pdc against CPA/BioLord/State/GEARS/scLambda and inspect full baseline metric profile.

split_sections.title: ComboSciPlex Task03 seen drug + seen cell, unseen cells
split_sections.question: When drug and cell context are in-distribution but cells are held out, which model better preserves perturbation response?
split_sections.object: matched held-out-group deltaPCC/RMSE and per-perturbation summaries
split_sections.method: Use headline matched deltaPCC plus matched_eval detail and per-perturbation distribution plots.

split_sections.title: ComboSciPlex Task03 unseen cell-line splits
split_sections.question: How does performance change under cell-line OOD generalization?
split_sections.object: A549/K562/MCF7 matched held-out-group and per-perturbation metrics
split_sections.method: Aggregate unseen-cell-line split rows and compare scale flow with CPA/BioLord.

split_sections.title: ComboSciPlex Task03 unseen-dose extrapolation
split_sections.question: Can models extrapolate dose-response deltas to held-out dose levels?
split_sections.object: test/validation unseen-dose matched deltaPCC/RMSE and per-perturbation metrics
split_sections.method: Compare matched_eval detail and per-perturbation deltaPCC distributions across dose extrapolation splits.

split_sections.title: ComboSciPlex Task04 seen singles, unseen combinations
split_sections.question: Does scale+pdc capture combination response better than CPA/BioLord?
split_sections.object: unseen-combination matched deltaPCC/RMSE and per-combo metrics
split_sections.method: Compare headline matched deltaPCC and per-combination distribution against CPA/BioLord.

split_sections.title: ZSCAPE external baseline splits
split_sections.question: Which non-scale baseline artifacts exist for ZSCAPE and can they be compared to scale+pdc in this run?
split_sections.method: Report availability and compatible baseline metric profiles when present.
